---
title: "loan-application"
description: "Synced from hadley/loan-application"
---

A real-world `data-dict.yaml`, synced from [hadley/loan-application](https://github.com/hadley/loan-application).
[Download the raw file](loan-application.yaml).

```{.yaml filename="loan-application.yaml"}
{{< include loan-application.yaml >}}
```
